name: P-6 prompt-promote --override-regression --reason is accepted to bypass regression block
command:
mkdir -p prompts/eval-history/test-agent && printf '%s' '{"eval_pass_rate":0.5}' > prompts/eval-history/test-agent/2.0.0.json && printf -- '- id: test-agent
  versions:
    - version: 1.0.0, eval_pass_rate: 0.9, status: active
    - version: 2.0.0, eval_pass_rate: 0.5, status: candidate
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-promote.sh" test-agent 2.0.0 --override-regression --reason 'compliance update' 2>err.txt && echo overridden 1>&2
